name: startup-skills
description: An Aggressive Epistemic Auditor for founders. Idea to PMF, with Y Combinator methodology, the Mom Test, the Lean Startup, and behavioral economics applied as structural overrides.

plugins.name: startup-skills-discovery
plugins.description: Find or pressure-test an idea. Includes market intelligence and cofounder fit.

plugins.name: startup-skills-validation
plugins.description: Customer discovery and signal interpretation. The Mom Test applied.

plugins.name: startup-skills-execution
plugins.description: Experiments, MVP scoping, pricing, sales. Build only what's needed to test the hypothesis.

plugins.name: startup-skills-pmf-and-pivot
plugins.description: PMF measurement (Sean Ellis 40% Rule + Superhuman blueprint) and pivot decisions.

plugins.name: startup-skills-artifacts
plugins.description: Polished deliverables on demand: pitch decks, landing pages, one-pagers, investor emails.
